name: hive-mcp-escrow
description: MCP server for the Hive Escrow platform. Agents open escrow agreements between buyer and seller DIDs, fund them on-chain via USDC/x402 settlement on Base, Ethereum, or Solana, release funds upon deliv
author: Steve Rotzin <steve@thehiveryiq.com> (https://www.thehiveryiq.com)
